name: repboard
author: Taako
description: A Red DiscordBot cog for community reputation, kudos, public rep boards, leaderboards, moderation, and CSV exports.
install_msg: repboard loaded. Use `[p]repboard setup` for a quick setup or `[p]repboard walkthrough` for the guided setup.
short: Community reputation, kudos, rep boards, leaderboards, and exports.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild reputation configuration, reputation records, Discord user IDs for givers, receivers, and moderators, reasons, message/channel IDs, timestamps, active/removed state, cooldown metadata, daily limit metadata, and aggregate reputation statistics. CSV exports are generated on demand and sent directly to Discord.
